summary.text: The question is: "Where to get PRP for hair loss Katy Texas." PRP stands for Platelet-Rich Plasma, used for hair loss treatment. The user wants locations or clinics in Katy, Texas that offer this.

action.query: PRP hair loss treatment Katy Texas
PRP hair restoration clinics Katy TX
"PRP" "hair" Katy Texas clinic OR doctor OR treatment

content.text:
**Several clinics and medical practices in Katy, Texas, offer PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy for hair loss.** This non-surgical treatment uses your own blood platelets to stimulate hair follicles and promote growth. Options range from medspas to dermatology and primary care practices. Always consult a qualified provider to discuss suitability, as results vary and multiple sessions are often needed.[[1]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/whole-body-wellness/hair-loss-treatment-with-prp/)[[2]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/hair-loss)

Here are some prominent local providers based on current information:

- **4Ever Young Anti-Aging (Katy location)**: Offers PRP combined with HydraFacial Keravive for comprehensive hair loss treatment.[[1]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/whole-body-wellness/hair-loss-treatment-with-prp/)
- **Integrative Primary Care (Dr. Syed Farhat Zaidi)**: 225 Bella Katy Dr, Katy, TX 77494. Specializes in PRP for hair loss to improve blood supply to follicles; typically recommends a series of treatments with maintenance.[[2]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/hair-loss)[[3]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/prp)
- **Ageless MedSpa Katy**: Provides noninvasive PRP hair restoration therapy.[[4]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hair-restoration/)
- **Luminous MediSpa**: PRP Hair Restoration at 410 W Grand Pkwy S, Suite 310, Katy, TX 77494.[[5]](https://luminousmedispa.com/prp-hair-restoration/)
- **Gameday Men’s Health (Katy)**: PRP therapy specifically for men’s hair loss/thinning, using concentrated platelets from your blood.[[6]](https://gamedaymenshealth.com/katy/prp-for-hair-loss)
- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics (The Luxe Effect)**: PRP treatments for hair growth in Katy.[[7]](https://theluxeeffect.com/our-services/prp/)
- **Aesthetic Master Infusions**: PRP for hair restoration (among other uses) in Katy.[[8]](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp)
- **Soo Med Spa Katy**: Advanced regenerative therapies including PRP for stimulating hair follicles.[[9]](https://soomedspa.com/services/hair-restoration.html)
- **Village Dermatology (Katy office)**: 23960 Katy Freeway, Suite 230, Katy, TX 77494. Offers PRP for androgenetic alopecia/hair loss (e.g., via providers like Dr. Reena Jogi).[[10]](https://www.villagedermatologyhouston.com/blog-village-dermatology/case-study-androgenetic-alopecia-in-a-22-year-old-male-and-treatment-with-prp-therapy)
- **H-Town Aesthetics**: PRP injections for hair restoration in Katy.[[11]](https://htownaesthetics.com/hair-restoration-in-texas/)

**Additional notes**: Some Houston-based providers (e.g., Dr. Janak Parikh or others on RealSelf) serve Katy patients. Yelp lists additional options like NHCG Trichology for hair restoration. Check reviews, verify credentials (e.g., board-certified dermatologists or experienced injectors), and confirm current availability/pricing directly, as offerings can change.[[12]](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=PRP+Hair&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)

For the latest details or to book consultations, visit the clinic websites or search locally for “PRP hair Katy TX.” Discuss expectations, potential side effects, and combination therapies with a professional.
